title: The Ancient Kingdom’s Shadow
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Vegapunk, Unknown person #13, Garp, Unknown person #14, Luffy, Kid as Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.
scene: Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oii! There's no place to ride it, chopper!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I see! So it's an automatic type!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, it probably has a name. Maybe we need to call its name to move?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you children? That won't make it move.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: While I was warping, the space got distorted!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's with this guy!? He's just like Kinemon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I knew you would come here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: There's a hover function in Dom Shoes!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fosh the side button while you pull down the lever.

summary: This part advances the Egghead / Vegapunk Truth through 38 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
